name: viral-video-master
description: Complete viral video optimization with 2025-2026 research-backed strategies. PROACTIVELY activate for: (1) any viral video strategy (TikTok/YouTube/Instagram/Facebook), (2) short-form optimization (Reels/Shorts/TikTok), (3) long-form YouTube, (4) hook optimization (1.3-second capture), (5) captions and subtitles, (6) thumbnails and CTR, (7) hashtags and SEO, (8) posting schedule, (9) repurposing, (10) retention, (11) trending audio, (12) editing pacing, (13) CTAs, (14) UGC, (15) algorithm understanding, (16) faceless content, (17) community growth, (18) shoppable video, (19) collaboration, (20) analytics.
